# Manila Tour — robots policy (generated by scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs).
# JS, CSS, fonts and images are NOT blocked. Auth protects the private pages;
# these rules just keep crawlers from wasting budget on them.

User-agent: *
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /user/login
Disallow: /user/register
Disallow: /user/profile
Disallow: /user/settings
Disallow: /chat
Disallow: /post/write
Disallow: /point/
Disallow: /api/
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://hanin.tv/sitemap.hanin.xml
